SEARCH
Package co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller

Class VentaController

java.lang.Object
co.edu.unbosque.venta.controller.VentaController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/ventas") @Transactional @CrossOrigin(origins={"*","localhost:8080"}) public class VentaController extends Object
REST controller for handling sales (Ventas) endpoints. Provides CRUD operations, reporting, and invoice retrieval.
Author:
Wilmer Ramos

    Description

    Description

    Creates a new sale (Venta).

    Retrieves all sales.

    Retrieves client information by cedula.

    Retrieves product information by product code.

  • Constructor Details

    • VentaController

      public VentaController()

  • Method Details

    • crear

      @PostMapping("/crear") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Venta> crear(@RequestBody Venta c)
      Creates a new sale (Venta).
      Parameters:
      c - the Venta object to create
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with created Venta or error status

    • mostrarTodo

      @GetMapping("/mostrartodo") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Venta>> mostrarTodo()
      Retrieves all sales.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with list of ventas

    • obtenerCliente

      @GetMapping("/clientes/{cedula}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ClienteDTO> obtenerCliente(@PathVariable Long cedula)
      Retrieves client information by cedula.
      Parameters:
      cedula - the client's identification number
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with ClienteDTO or not found

    • obtenerProductoPorCodigo

      @GetMapping("/buscarPorCodigo/{codigo}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ProductoDTO> obtenerProductoPorCodigo(@PathVariable Long codigo)
      Retrieves product information by product code.
      Parameters:
      codigo - the product code
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with ProductoDTO or not found

    • reporteVentasPorCliente

      @GetMapping("/reporte-cliente") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Object>> reporteVentasPorCliente()
      Generates a report of total sales per client.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with report data and total sum

    • obtenerFactura

      @GetMapping("/factura/{codigoVenta}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<FacturaDTO> obtenerFactura(@PathVariable Long codigoVenta)
      Retrieves the invoice (FacturaDTO) for a sale by its code.
      Parameters:
      codigoVenta - the sale code
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with FacturaDTO or not found
